title: schefflera subracemosa
intro: Schefflera subracemosa is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the umbrella tree or philodendron tree. The medicinal properties of Schefflera subracemosa include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Schefflera subracemosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
